limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4 or 5 as a result.
AI use cases are named (network design, operations, software development, sales, marketing, customer support) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.

Risk disclosure describes specific mechanisms (model errors, bias, IP infringement, regulatory uncertainty, cybercriminal AI use) and links them to operational/legal/reputational consequences, supporting a score of 4; no quantified risk figures or named governance bodies were found to justify a score of 5.
The DriveNets equity investment ($819M additional investments noted in the table) is not explicitly broken out as AI-attributable capex in the excerpts, so it was not included in capex_mentions.
